seoTitle: Lyra vs Lytton — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyra and Lytton. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyra and Lytton.
heading: Lyra vs Lytton — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyra, Queensland and Lytton, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lyra has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Lytton (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyra or Lytton safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyra has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Lytton scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyra scores 19/100 for bushfire risk. Lytton scores 60/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyra or Lytton?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lyra has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
